subject: [PATCH v2 1/2] nfs: fix utimensat() for atime with delegated timestamps

2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS client where delegated timestamps don't properly update the ctime when only the atime is changed using utimensat(). The problem occurs because there's no mtime update to trigger the delegated attribute update. To fix this, the client now issues an RPC to update the ctime alongside the atime.
